title: Document missing modules in ARCHITECTURE.md — close 85% → 90% gap
description:
ARCHITECTURE.md is at 85%. Recent commits already added: store/index.js docs, embed.js section, CLI+sox+download-state docs, runtime overview paragraph. Remaining gaps per architecture.json:

1. [MAJOR/partial] src/runtime/embed.js and src/runtime/adapters/ — adapters (sense.js, voice/openai-tts.js, voice/openai-whisper.js, voice/piper.js, voice/elevenlabs.js, voice/macos-say.js) still only in addendum notes, need formal module sections.

2. [MINOR/partial] src/runtime/sense.js — full API (init/on/start/stop/detect/startWakeWordPipeline etc.) beyond brief mention.

3. [MINOR/missing] profiler.js + latency-log.js — mentioned in overview paragraph but no formal API section.

Prioritize item 1 (major). Items 2-3 can be brief entries.
